title: Kolkata Heat Wave
lead: Kolkata is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.40. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kolkata has resulted in a high CDD of 10.9 GG, indicating extremely hot days. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, adding to the discomfort. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 4.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
